quotes: Apply the palette in the primary > secondary > tertiary ratio
Headlines/headings: Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
Body text: Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds
Apply the palette in the **primary > secondary > tertiary ratio** shown in the guide: blues and golds dominate; tertiary colors are accents and surfaces.
**Headlines/headings:** Brand Blue (or White on dark/gradient backgrounds).
**Body text:** Graphite #212121 on light backgrounds; White on dark backgrounds (with increased line height, §1.2).

rules.intent: Maintain established typographic contrast and color hierarchy across varying section background values.
rules.rule_text: Apply the palette using the primary > secondary > tertiary ratio where blues and golds dominate. Apply Brand Blue (headline.color = #00529b) for headlines and headings on light backgrounds, switching to White (#ffffff) on dark or gradient backgrounds. Use Graphite (body.color = #212121) for body text on light backgrounds and White (#ffffff) on dark backgrounds (with increased line height).

quotes: **Charts/about:blank** Brand Blue + Sky Blue dominant; **Sunshine/Gold strictly reserved for emphasizing key figures**; gray for placebo.

rules.intent: Ensure consistent functional meaning for accent colors in data visualizations.
rules.rule_text: In charts, Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB) must dominate; Sunshine/Gold (#faa31b/#ffc60a) is strictly reserved for highlighting/emphasizing key data points or figures, and gray must be used for placebos.

quotes: Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts)
**Callout surfaces:** Light Blue at 70% tint (data callouts); Golden Sand at 30% tint (text-heavy callouts).

rules.intent: Enforce specific visual treatments and legibility standards for different callout types.
rules.rule_text: For callout surfaces, apply Light Blue (#E6F0F9) at 70% opacity (opacity.callout.70 = 0.7) for data callouts, and Golden Sand (#FEF1C8) at 30% opacity (opacity.callout.golden_sand_box = 0.3) for text-heavy callouts.

quotes: **Coral:** sparing tertiary accent only — never for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. **[GENERAL]:** avoid Coral in email sections unless the brief calls for it.

rules.intent: Prevent overuse of Coral which distracts from primary visual hierarchy.
rules.rule_text: Coral (#F26A38) must only be used as a sparing tertiary accent. It must never be used for primary CTAs, headlines, or data. Avoid using Coral in email sections unless explicitly required by the creative brief.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.
**Links [GENERAL]:** Brand Blue #00529b, underlined, on light backgrounds; White underlined on dark.

rules.intent: Ensure clear, accessible link identification across contrasting layouts.
rules.rule_text: Hyperlinks must be underlined and style-bound to Brand Blue (body.link.color = #00529b) on light backgrounds, and White (#ffffff) and underlined on dark backgrounds.

quotes: 70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances
The logo icon's **70% transparency of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a must be maintained in all instances** (logo, and when the mark is used as a pattern/graphic).

rules.intent: Maintain strict, legal brand identifier compliance across all layouts.
rules.rule_text: The logo icon's gold layer must maintain its 70% transparency (opacity.logo.gold = 0.7) of Pantone 7548 C / #ffc60a in all instances, including when the brand mark is repeated as a pattern or standalone graphic asset.
